Location: ATP.temTH.CandidateTheorems.T1.Free:candidate_T1_free

Imports: Mathlib

Code:
```lean
theorem candidate_T1_free (χ : Character G) (hχ : χ ≠ 1) :
    ∑ g : G, (χ g : ℂ) = 0 := by
  -- `Character G` is a multiplicative character into `ℂˣ`.
  -- Use the general finite-group lemma for monoid homs into units.
  simpa using sum_hom_units_eq_zero (f := χ) hχ
```

Code:
```lean
theorem candidate_T1_free (χ : Character G) (hχ : χ ≠ 1) :
    ∑ g : G, (χ g : ℂ) = 0 := by
  -- `Character G` is a homomorphism `G →* ℂˣ`, and this is the
  -- standard finite-group orthogonality consequence for a nontrivial character.
  simpa using sum_hom_units_eq_zero (f := χ) hχ
```

theorem candidate_T1_free (χ : Character G) (hχ : χ ≠ 1) :
    ∑ g : G, (χ g : ℂ) = 0 := by
  have hsum : ∑ g : G, ((χ g : ℂˣ) : ℂ) = 0 := by
    simpa using sum_hom_units_eq_zero (f := χ) hχ
  simpa using hsum
